moments.title: World Cup Final Looms
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is set for Sunday, July 19, with the ultimate football champions to be crowned in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Sunday. The World Cup final. Who do you think will lift the trophy this weekend? The tension is building!

angles.name: Big Game Buzz
angles.copy: Just days until the biggest game in football! The World Cup final is almost here. Where are you watching the action?

moments.title: Wimbledon Crowns Champions
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 12, after two weeks of thrilling tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Wrap-up
angles.copy: Another year, another iconic Wimbledon. Who was your standout player from the Championships that wrapped up on Sunday?

angles.name: Tennis Talk
angles.copy: The grass courts have fallen silent for another year. What a fortnight of tennis at Wimbledon 2026!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins on Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf Major Begins
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship is back this week. Royal Birkdale is ready for the world's best golfers from Thursday!

angles.name: Claret Jug Hunt
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! The Open tees off on Thursday. Who are you backing to lift the coveted Claret Jug?

moments.title: Coldplay's Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Coldplay bring their 'Music of the Spheres' tour to Wembley Stadium for multiple nights this week, starting Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Wembley Lights Up
angles.copy: Ready for some 'Yellow'? Coldplay hit Wembley Stadium this week for a string of massive shows. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Music of the Spheres
angles.copy: Chris Martin and co. are lighting up Wembley from Thursday! Coldplay's 'Music of the Spheres' tour is set to be spectacular.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music, begins on Wednesday, July 15, on the Isle of Lewis.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for some fantastic tunes! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on Wednesday on the Isle of Lewis.

angles.name: Island Festival
angles.copy: Traditional and contemporary Celtic music unite! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts tomorrow. Who's heading to the Outer Hebrides?

moments.title: Splendour Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend in Nottingham! Get ready for two days of great music at Wollaton Hall.

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're in Nottinghamshire, your weekend plans are sorted! Splendour Festival brings big names and good vibes.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, featuring a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: It's almost time for Latitude! Henham Park is gearing up for a huge weekend of music and arts from July 23rd.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Planning your Latitude Festival trip? It's just over a week away! Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' Still Hot
moments.blurb: Sabrina Carpenter's massive hit 'Espresso' continues to be a staple on the airwaves and flying high in the UK charts.

angles.name: Espresso Power
angles.copy: Still sipping that 'Espresso'? Sabrina Carpenter's huge track is still everywhere and flying high in the charts!

angles.name: Chart Staple
angles.copy: It's the song of the summer, and it's still going strong! Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' is a bonafide hit.

moments.title: Billie Eilish's 'Birds of a Feather' Soaring
moments.blurb: Billie Eilish's acclaimed track 'Birds of a Feather' continues its impressive run, remaining a popular choice on the UK charts.

angles.name: Billie's Hit
angles.copy: Still got 'Birds of a Feather' on repeat? Billie Eilish's beautiful track is a huge hit and still soaring in the charts.

angles.name: Chart Success
angles.copy: Billie Eilish is a chart force to be reckoned with! 'Birds of a Feather' is still a massive tune.

moments.title: Love Island Final Countdown
moments.blurb: The drama in the villa intensifies as Love Island UK 2026 builds towards its grand final, expected on Monday, July 27.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's getting dumped? Love Island is delivering all the drama as the final approaches!

angles.name: Final Prediction
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just around the corner! Which couple do you think will go all the way and win?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Many
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales begin to break up for the long-awaited summer holidays this week and next, typically from July 17-24.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Freedom! The school summer holidays are starting for many this week. What are your big plans for the break?

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! Summer holidays are officially here for a lot of families. Enjoy the well-deserved break!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: Heatwave conditions are set to continue across England and Wales this week, with temperatures exceeding 30°C and an ongoing risk of wildfires.

angles.name: Staying Cool
angles.copy: Another hot one! The heatwave continues across parts of the UK. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool!

angles.name: Summer Sun Safety
angles.copy: With temperatures soaring past 30°C, it's crucial to stay safe in the sun. Stay hydrated and watch out for wildfire risks.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer Stewart Copeland of The Police celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer
angles.copy: The rhythmic backbone of The Police! Happy 74th birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland this Thursday!

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to legendary drummer Stewart Copeland, who turns 74 on Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Friday, July 19.

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May from Queen this Friday! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: He's a rock legend, an astrophysicist, and a knight! Wishing Brian May a fantastic 79th birthday on Friday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist and Rock and Roll Hall of Famer Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Master
angles.copy: The master of the guitar, Carlos Santana, turns 79 this Saturday! Which of his tracks always gets you moving?

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Still rocking after all these years! Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana this Saturday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles drummer and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley turns 79 on Monday! What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Vocal Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Don Henley of The Eagles this Monday!

moments.title: Happy 40th Danny Jones
moments.blurb: McFly guitarist and singer Danny Jones celebrates his 40th birthday on Monday, July 22.

angles.name: McFly Turns 40
angles.copy: It's a big one! Happy 40th birthday to McFly's Danny Jones this Monday! What's your favourite McFly tune?

angles.name: Pop-Punk Star
angles.copy: From pop-punk sensation to The Voice coach, wishing a huge happy 40th to Danny Jones this Monday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar icon Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Friday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: The top hat, the Gibson, the riffs! Happy 61st birthday to the legendary Slash this Friday!

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Icon
angles.copy: No one quite like him. Wishing a huge happy 61st birthday to Guns N' Roses' guitar hero, Slash, this Friday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Saturday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo Turns 57
angles.copy: From the block to the world stage! Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Saturday!

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Still dancing, still singing, still iconic. Happy 57th birthday to Jennifer Lopez this Saturday!
